chunks.text: SERVICE AGREEMENT This Service Agreement (“Agreement”) is entered into on March 1, 2026, between: Alpha Analytics LLC (“Provider”) and Bright Retail Co. (“Client”).
chunks.title: Preamble

chunks.text: Provider agrees to deliver data analytics and reporting services to Client, including dashboard creation and performance tracking. Specific deliverables will be discussed and agreed upon verbally or via email.
chunks.title: 1. Scope of Services

chunks.text: This Agreement shall begin on the effective date and continue on an ongoing basis unless terminated by either party.
chunks.title: 2. Term

chunks.text: Client agrees to pay Provider $5,000 per month for services rendered. Payment shall be made within a reasonable time after receipt of invoice.
chunks.title: 3. Payment

chunks.text: Either party may terminate this Agreement at any time for any reason.
chunks.title: 4. Termination

chunks.text: Both parties agree not to share confidential information obtained during the course of this Agreement.
chunks.title: 5. Confidentiality

chunks.text: Provider is an independent contractor and not an employee of Client.
chunks.title: 6. Independent Contractor

chunks.text: Both parties agree to work together in good faith to fulfill the intent of this Agreement.
chunks.title: 7. General Cooperation

chunks.text: This document represents the full agreement between the parties. IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement.
chunks.title: 8. Entire Agreement
